gap_notes: Diffed the leadpoet.com OpenAPI schema (5 paths) for undiscovered public GET endpoints -- all 4 GET routes (health, geo/countries, geo/states, geo/cities) were already tracked; the 5th path is a non-GET contact-form route, out of scope.

name: Leadpoet
notes: First maintainer review for SN71. Added website + source-repo surfaces, fixed 1 missing probe block. OpenAPI diff confirmed full coverage of the schema's public GET surface.

surfaces.name: Leadpoet website
surfaces.notes: Official Leadpoet SN71 public website -- verified live 2026-07-15.

surfaces.name: Leadpoet source repository
surfaces.notes: Official SN71 miner/validator source repository -- verified live 2026-07-15.

surfaces.name: Leadpoet web health API
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /api/health on leadpoet.com returning JSON liveness (observed: {"status":"ok","service":"leadpoet-web",...}). Documented in the subnet's own OpenAPI (leadpoet.com/api/openapi.json, path /api/health); same host as the official Leadpoet website linked from the SN71 source repository README.

surfaces.name: Leadpoet public web API OpenAPI schema
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth OpenAPI 3.x schema for the SN71 Leadpoet web API (title "Leadpoet Public API", 5 paths) on leadpoet.com. Documents /api/health, /api/contact, and geo lookup routes for agents and prospective customers; same host as the existing health surface.

surfaces.name: Leadpoet country reference list
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /api/geo/countries on leadpoet.com returning the ISO country code/label reference list used by the platform's lead-fulfillment forms. Confirmed present at the exact path in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema (GET /api/geo/countries, tag "reference", summary "List ISO countries (priority-ordered)", response schema GeoOption[]) — the same schema already registered as the sn-71-leadpoet-openapi surface in this file; same leadpoet.com host as the existing health surface.

surfaces.name: Leadpoet geo states
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET returning the supported US states list for lead geo-targeting. Documented in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema.

surfaces.name: Leadpoet geo cities
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET returning the supported cities list for lead geo-targeting. Documented in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema.

surfaces.name: Leadpoet contact form API
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth POST /api/contact on leadpoet.com documented in the subnet OpenAPI schema (path /api/contact). Marketing contact-form submit with a JSON body; probe.enabled:false because it is a write endpoint and not safe to auto-probe. Live-verified 2026-07-21: GET returns HTTP 200 (endpoint reachable); POST left unfired.
